creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Tue Oct 22 03:58:13 2013
New Revision: 331218
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/331218

Log:
  - Update from 0.83.8 to 0.84.2 [1]
  - Add LICENSE [1]
  - Add stage support
  
  PR:		ports/183149
  Submitted by:	Mathias Monnerville <mathias@monnerville.com> (maintainer) [1]

Modified:
  head/www/glpi/Makefile
  head/www/glpi/distinfo
  head/www/glpi/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/glpi/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/glpi/Makefile	Tue Oct 22 03:19:13 2013	(r331217)
+++ head/www/glpi/Makefile	Tue Oct 22 03:58:13 2013	(r331218)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	glpi
-PORTVERSION=	0.83.8
+PORTVERSION=	0.84.2
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://droidng.free.fr/freebsd/ \
@@ -11,20 +11,21 @@ MASTER_SITES=	http://droidng.free.fr/fre
 MAINTAINER=	mathias@monnerville.com
 COMMENT=	Free IT and asset management software
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 USE_PHP=	mysql mbstring pcre session xml json ctype
 WANT_PHP_WEB=	yes
 
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 PKGMESSAGE=	${WRKDIR}/pkg-message
-CPIOARGS=	--quiet -pdum -R
+CPIOARGS=	--quiet -pdum
 
 GLPIDIR?=	www/${PORTNAME}
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	LDAP IMAP
 IMAP_DESC=	IMAP support
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MLDAP}
@@ -43,11 +44,7 @@ post-configure:
 	  -e 's,%%GLPIDIR%%,${GLPIDIR},g' pkg-message > ${PKGMESSAGE}
 
 do-install:
-	@${MKDIR} -m 0755 ${PREFIX}/${GLPIDIR}
-	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${FIND} * -print | ${CPIO} ${CPIOARGS} ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${PREFIX}/${GLPIDIR}
-	@${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${PREFIX}/${GLPIDIR}
-
-post-install:
-	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
+	@${MKDIR} -m 0755 ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/${GLPIDIR}
+	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${FIND} * -print | ${CPIO} ${CPIOARGS} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/${GLPIDIR}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================
